name: COT Weekly Update

nodes.name: Trigger: Friday 22:30 CET
nodes.description: Triggers every Friday at 22:30 Europe/Madrid timezone to fetch the latest COT report

nodes.name: Fetch COT Data from CFTC API
nodes.description: Fetches Commitment of Traders data from CFTC public API. The API returns JSON with fields: report_date, market_name, long_commercial, short_commercial, long_noncommercial, short_noncommercial, etc.

nodes.name: Parse & Filter COT Data
nodes.description: Filters COT data to keep only the configured markets and maps CFTC market names to trading symbols. Also calculates basic net positions for commercial and non-commercial traders.

nodes.name: Calculate COT Metrics
nodes.description: Calculates weekly changes, institutional bias (LONG/SHORT/NEUTRAL based on ±10% threshold), and historical extreme indicators. Compares current positions with cached previous week data.

nodes.name: Format Summary Report
nodes.description: Formats the COT data into a human-readable summary with emojis for easy visual parsing. Includes market direction, weekly changes, and historical extreme warnings.

nodes.name: Store Latest COT JSON
nodes.description: Stores the latest COT data as JSON to /data/cache/cot_latest.json for quick access by other workflows or systems

nodes.name: Store COT History (52 weeks)
nodes.description: Maintains a 52-week rolling history of COT data in /data/cache/cot_history.json. Updates historical values array for percentile calculations and stores weekly snapshots.

nodes.name: Store Summary TXT
nodes.description: Stores formatted summary as /data/cache/cot_summary.txt for quick human review

nodes.name: Webhook GET /webhook/cot-latest
nodes.description: HTTP GET endpoint to retrieve the formatted COT summary report

nodes.name: Webhook GET /webhook/cot-data
nodes.description: HTTP GET endpoint to retrieve full COT data as JSON

nodes.name: Prepare cot-data Response
nodes.description: Loads cached COT data from file for the cot-data webhook endpoint

nodes.name: Prepare Summary Response
nodes.description: Loads cached summary from file for the cot-latest webhook endpoint

main.node: Fetch COT Data from CFTC API

description: Fetches CFTC Commitment of Traders report every Friday at 22:30 CET, processes 12 markets (Forex, Indexes, Energy, Metals, Crypto), calculates institutional bias and historical extremes, stores cache files, and exposes webhooks.
